signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in prior months but below 2.4% forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence** [1]

signals.headline: Iran x Israel/US Conflict End Date Market Dominates X Chatter | NO whale bets or tips reported | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran x Israel/US Conflict End Date Market Dominates X Chatter | NO whale bets or tips reported | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active X-related market assigns **97% odds** to the Iran x Israel/US conflict ending by December 31, 2026, amid 1346 live X prediction markets with over $121M volume, signaling high trader focus on this geopolitical resolution[1]. No specific X posts from Polymarket

signals.headline: IUML Releases First List of 27 Candidates for Kerala Assembly Election 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
IUML Releases First List of 27 Candidates for Kerala Assembly Election 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Indian Union Muslim League (IUML) has announced its initial candidate list for 25 of the 27 seats it plans to contest in the 140-seat Kerala Legislative Assembly election on April 9, 2026, as part of the Congress-led UDF alliance (Congress contesting 95 seats).[1][2]

signals.headline: Kon Knueppel Favored Again for 2025-26 NBA Rookie of the Year After Flagg's Poor Performance | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kon Knueppel Favored Again for 2025-26 NBA Rookie of the Year After Flagg's Poor Performance | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Knueppel (+210 odds) has reclaimed the top spot in NBA Rookie of the Year betting markets as of April 9, surpassing Cooper Flagg (-290), following Flagg's inefficient 11-point outing (4-18 FG) in Dallas' loss at Phoenix on April 8 evening[2].
